<html lang="en" class="scroll-smooth">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>SNCIO | Stop the Profit Leak in Your Plant</title>
  <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=DM+Sans:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;1,400&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <style>
    /* ── DESIGN TOKENS ─────────────────────────────── */
    :root {
      --orange:      #f97316;
      --orange-dark: #c2530a;
      --teal:        #0ea5c8;
      --teal-dark:   #0a7a97;
      --navy:        #1e3a5f;

      /* Light theme */
      --bg:          #f8fafc;
      --bg-card:     #ffffff;
      --bg-section:  #f1f5f9;
      --text:        #1e293b;
      --text-muted:  #475569;
      --text-light:  #94a3b8;
      --border:      #e2e8f0;
      --border-md:   rgba(14,165,200,0.22);

      /* Shadows */
      --shadow-sm:  0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.07), 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
      --shadow-md:  0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.08), 0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
      --shadow-lg:  0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.1),  0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
    }

    * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

    body {
      background: var(--bg);
      color: var(--text);
      font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
      overflow-x: hidden;
      line-height: 1.6;
    }

    /* ── TYPOGRAPHY ────────────────────────────────── */
    .font-display { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.03em; }
    .font-mono    { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; }

    /* ── GRID BG (light version) ────────────────────── */
    .grid-bg {
      background-color: var(--bg);
      background-image:
        linear-gradient(rgba(14,165,200,0.07) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(14,165,200,0.07) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(rgba(14,165,200,0.03) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(14,165,200,0.03) 1px, transparent 1px);
      background-size: 80px 80px, 80px 80px, 20px 20px, 20px 20px;
    }

    /* ── NAV ────────────────────────────────────────── */
    nav {
      background: rgba(248,250,252,0.92);
      backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
      -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100;
    }
    .nav-inner {
      max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto;
      padding: 10px 32px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    }

    /* ── LOGO EMBOSS ────────────────────────────────── */
    .logo-emboss {
      filter:
        drop-shadow(2px 3px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.18))
        drop-shadow(-1px -1px 3px rgba(255,255,255,0.9));
    }

    /* ── BUTTONS ────────────────────────────────────── */
    .btn-primary {
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
      background: var(--orange);
      color: #fff;
      font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      padding: 12px 26px;
      border-radius: 10px;
      border: none; cursor: pointer;
      text-decoration: none;
      transition: all 0.22s ease;
      box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(249,115,22,0.3);
    }
    .btn-primary:hover {
      background: var(--orange-dark);
      transform: translateY(-2px);
      box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(249,115,22,0.4);
    }
    .btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.6; transform: none; cursor: not-allowed; }

    .btn-secondary {
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
      background: transparent;
      color: var(--teal-dark);
      font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      padding: 11px 22px;
      border-radius: 10px;
      border: 2px solid var(--teal);
      cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;
      transition: all 0.22s ease;
    }
    .btn-secondary:hover {
      background: var(--teal);
      color: #fff;
      transform: translateY(-2px);
      box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(14,165,200,0.25);
    }

    /* ── CARDS ──────────────────────────────────────── */
    .card {
      background: var(--bg-card);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 14px;
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
    }
    .card-elevated {
      background: var(--bg-card);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-md);
      border-radius: 14px;
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
    }

    /* ── TAG CHIP ───────────────────────────────────── */
    .tag {
      font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 10.5px;
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--teal-dark);
      border: 1px solid rgba(14,165,200,0.3);
      background: rgba(14,165,200,0.08);
      padding: 4px 12px;
      border-radius: 20px;
      display: inline-block;
    }

    /* ── SECTION WRAPPER ────────────────────────────── */
    .section-inner {
      max-width: 1280px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      padding: 0 32px;
    }
    @media (max-width: 640px) {
      .section-inner { padding: 0 16px; }
      .nav-inner { padding: 10px 16px; }
    }

    /* ── HERO ───────────────────────────────────────── */
    .hero-section {
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: flex; align-items: center;
      padding-top: 80px;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .hero-orb {
      position: absolute; border-radius: 50%;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    /* ── BLUEPRINT IMAGE ────────────────────────────── */
    .blueprint-frame {
      position: relative; border-radius: 16px;
      overflow: hidden;
      border: 1px solid rgba(14,165,200,0.25);
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
    }
    .blueprint-frame img {
      width: 100%; display: block;
      aspect-ratio: 4/3; object-fit: cover;
    }
    .blueprint-overlay {
      position: absolute; inset: 0;
      background: linear-gradient(180deg,
        rgba(255,255,255,0.05) 0%,
        transparent 35%,
        transparent 65%,
        rgba(15,23,42,0.55) 100%);
    }
    .blueprint-badge {
      position: absolute; top: 14px; left: 14px;
      background: rgba(10,16,28,0.78);
      border: 1px solid rgba(14,165,200,0.4);
      border-radius: 6px; padding: 5px 12px;
      font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 9.5px; color: #5de0f8;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    }
    .blueprint-caption {
      position: absolute; bottom: 12px; left: 14px; right: 14px;
      font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 9.5px; color: rgba(94,224,248,0.85);
    }
    .corner-tl, .corner-br {
      position: absolute; width: 56px; height: 56px;
    }
    .corner-tl { top: -4px; right: -4px;
      border-top: 2.5px solid var(--orange);
      border-right: 2.5px solid var(--orange); opacity: 0.7; }
    .corner-br { bottom: -4px; left: -4px;
      border-bottom: 2.5px solid var(--teal);
      border-left: 2.5px solid var(--teal); opacity: 0.7; }

    /* ── METRIC CARDS ───────────────────────────────── */
    .metric-orange {
      border-left: 4px solid var(--orange);
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(249,115,22,0.06), var(--bg-card));
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
    }
    .metric-teal {
      border-left: 4px solid var(--teal);
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(14,165,200,0.06), var(--bg-card));
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
    }

    /* ── DIVIDER ────────────────────────────────────── */
    .section-divider {
      height: 1px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--border), transparent);
    }

    /* ── STEP NUMBER ────────────────────────────────── */
    .step-num {
      width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 12px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 1.5rem;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    /* ── SUBSIDY BLOCK ──────────────────────────────── */
    .subsidy-card {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff8f4, #fff);
      border: 1px solid rgba(249,115,22,0.2);
      border-radius: 20px;
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
      position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    }
    .subsidy-stripe {
      position: absolute; top: 0; right: 0;
      width: 35%; height: 100%;
      background: repeating-linear-gradient(
        -45deg, transparent, transparent 7px,
        rgba(249,115,22,0.04) 7px, rgba(249,115,22,0.04) 14px
      );
      border-left: 1px dashed rgba(249,115,22,0.18);
    }

    /* ── PULSE BADGE ────────────────────────────────── */
    @keyframes pulse-ring {
      0%   { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0   rgba(249,115,22,0.5); }
      70%  { box-shadow: 0 0 0 14px rgba(249,115,22,0);  }
      100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0   rgba(249,115,22,0);   }
    }
    .pulse-dot { animation: pulse-ring 2.5s ease-out infinite; border-radius: 50%; }

    /* ── SVG BLUEPRINT ROOMS ─────────────────────────── */
    .broom       { fill: rgba(14,165,200,0.08); stroke: rgba(14,165,200,0.55); stroke-width:1.5; }
    .broom-after { fill: rgba(249,115,22,0.08); stroke: rgba(249,115,22,0.55); stroke-width:1.5; }
    .btext       { fill: #475569; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:9.5px; }

    /* ── FORM INPUTS ────────────────────────────────── */
    .form-input {
      width: 100%; padding: 11px 16px;
      background: var(--bg-section);
      border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 10px;
      color: var(--text);
      font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
      font-size: 0.875rem;
      outline: none;
      transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
    }
    .form-input:focus {
      border-color: var(--teal);
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(14,165,200,0.12);
    }
    .form-input::placeholder { color: var(--text-light); }
    .form-input option { background: #fff; color: var(--text); }
    .form-label {
      display: block; margin-bottom: 6px;
      font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--text-muted); letter-spacing: 0.01em;
    }
    .form-group { margin-bottom: 18px; }

    /* ── RADIO CARDS ────────────────────────────────── */
    .radio-card {
      border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
      background: var(--bg-section);
      border-radius: 10px; padding: 12px;
      text-align: center; cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.18s ease;
    }
    .radio-card:hover { border-color: var(--teal); background: rgba(14,165,200,0.05); }
    .radio-card.selected { border-color: var(--orange); background: rgba(249,115,22,0.07); }

    /* ── FLAG CARDS ─────────────────────────────────── */
    .flag-card {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
      background: var(--bg-card);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 18px;
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
      transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
    }
    .flag-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); }

    /* ── SCROLL REVEAL ───────────────────────────────── */
    .reveal {
      opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px);
      transition: opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease;
    }
    .reveal.visible { opacity: 1; transform: none; }

    /* ── FOOTER ──────────────────────────────────────── */
    footer {
      background: var(--navy);
      color: rgba(240,246,252,0.85);
    }
    footer a { transition: color 0.18s; }
    footer a:hover { color: #fff; }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════
     NAV
══════════════════════════════════ -->
<nav>
  <div class="nav-inner">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="SNCIO"
           class="logo-emboss"
           style="height:50px;width:auto;object-fit:contain;" />
      <span class="font-mono" style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);" id="nav-sub" class="nav-subtitle"> Optimize,Exucute,Scale</span>
    </div>
    <a href="#contact" class="btn-primary" style="padding:10px 20px;font-size:0.82rem;">Book Free Call</a>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════
     HERO
══════════════════════════════════ -->
<section class="hero-section grid-bg">
  <!-- Orbs -->
  <div class="hero-orb" style="width:560px;height:560px;top:-80px;right:-120px;
    background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(249,115,22,0.09),transparent 70%);"></div>
  <div class="hero-orb" style="width:400px;height:400px;bottom:-60px;left:-80px;
    background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(14,165,200,0.08),transparent 70%);"></div>

  <div class="section-inner" style="padding-top:40px;padding-bottom:60px;position:relative;z-index:2;">
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:60px;align-items:center;"
         class="hero-grid">
      <!-- Copy -->
      <div>
        <div class="tag" style="margin-bottom:18px;">Gujarat GIDC · MSME Specialists</div>
        <h1 class="font-display" style="font-size:clamp(2.8rem,6vw,5.2rem);line-height:0.95;
            color:var(--text);margin-bottom:22px;">
          YOUR PLANT FLOOR<br/>
          <span style="color:var(--orange);">LEAKS 15–30%</span><br/>
          OF YOUR PROFIT.<br/>
          <span style="color:var(--text-muted);">EVERY. SINGLE. DAY.</span>
        </h1>
        <p style="font-size:1rem;color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.75;max-width:480px;margin-bottom:14px;">
          A chaotic floor plan isn't just an inconvenience — it's a
          <strong style="color:var(--text);">Permanent Tax</strong> on every rupee you earn.
          Wasted motion, blocked material flow, and idle capacity silently drain your margins.
        </p>
        <p style="font-size:0.95rem;color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.75;max-width:480px;margin-bottom:32px;">
          SNCIO brings <strong style="color:var(--text);">North American industrial engineering precision</strong>
          to Gujarat's GIDC clusters — and via the MSME Lean Scheme, you pay just
          <strong style="color:var(--orange);">10% of our fee.</strong>
        </p>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;">
          <a href="#contact" class="btn-primary">→ Book Free 30-Min Plant Efficiency Call</a>
          <a href="#system" class="btn-secondary">How It Works</a>
        </div>
        <p class="font-mono" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-light);margin-top:14px;">
          No obligation. No sales pitch. Just a diagnosis.
        </p>
      </div>

      <!-- Blueprint Image -->
      <div style="position:relative;">
        <div class="blueprint-frame">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="SNCIO CAD Plant Layout Blueprint" />
          <div class="blueprint-overlay"></div>
          <div class="blueprint-badge">CAD LAYOUT · SNCIO OPTIMIZED</div>
          <div class="blueprint-caption">Prototype Assembly / Press Staging / Weld Zones</div>
        </div>
        <div class="corner-tl"></div>
        <div class="corner-br"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Metric Bar -->
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:14px;margin-top:52px;"
         class="reveal metric-bar">
      <div class="card metric-orange" style="padding:18px;border-radius:12px;">
        <p class="font-display" style="font-size:2.4rem;color:var(--orange);line-height:1;">15–30%</p>
        <p style="font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:4px;">Avg. profit leakage in unoptimized MSME plants</p>
      </div>
      <div class="card metric-teal" style="padding:18px;border-radius:12px;">
        <p class="font-display" style="font-size:2.4rem;color:var(--teal-dark);line-height:1;">90%</p>
        <p style="font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:4px;">Government subsidy via MSME Lean Scheme</p>
      </div>
      <div class="card metric-orange" style="padding:18px;border-radius:12px;">
        <p class="font-display" style="font-size:2.4rem;color:var(--orange);line-height:1;">3</p>
        <p style="font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:4px;">Countries of engineering experience: USA · Mexico · Canada</p>
      </div>
      <div class="card metric-teal" style="padding:18px;border-radius:12px;">
        <p class="font-display" style="font-size:2.4rem;color:var(--teal-dark);line-height:1;">1 Hr</p>
        <p style="font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:4px;">Gemba Walk audit to pinpoint your biggest bottleneck</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════
     GLOBAL CREDENTIALS
══════════════════════════════════ -->
<section style="background:var(--bg-section);padding:56px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--border);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:flex-start;gap:32px;">
      <!-- Heading block -->
      <div style="min-width:220px;flex:0 0 auto;">
        <div class="tag" style="margin-bottom:10px;">Global Pedigree</div>
        <h2 class="font-display" style="font-size:2rem;color:var(--text);line-height:1.1;">
          NORTH AMERICAN<br/>PRECISION.<br/>INDIAN GROUND.
        </h2>
      </div>
      <!-- Divider (vertical on md+) -->
      <div style="width:1px;background:var(--border);align-self:stretch;flex:0 0 1px;" class="cred-divider"></div>
      <!-- Flag cards -->
      <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;flex:1;align-items:center;">
        <div class="flag-card">
          <span style="font-size:2rem;">🇺🇸</span>
          <div>
            <p style="font-weight:600;font-size:0.88rem;color:var(--text);">United States</p>
            <p class="font-mono" style="font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);">Lean · Six Sigma · TPS</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="flag-card">
          <span style="font-size:2rem;">🇲🇽</span>
          <div>
            <p style="font-weight:600;font-size:0.88rem;color:var(--text);">Mexico</p>
            <p class="font-mono" style="font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);">Maquiladora · Assembly Ops</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="flag-card">
          <span style="font-size:2rem;">🇨🇦</span>
          <div>
            <p style="font-weight:600;font-size:0.88rem;color:var(--text);">Canada</p>
            <p class="font-mono" style="font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);">Process Optimization · EHS</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="flag-card" style="border-color:rgba(249,115,22,0.35);">
          <span style="font-size:2rem;">🇮🇳</span>
          <div>
            <p style="font-weight:600;font-size:0.88rem;color:var(--text);">India — GIDC</p>
            <p class="font-mono" style="font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--orange);">MSME Lean Scheme Qualified</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <p style="margin-top:24px;font-size:0.88rem;color:var(--text-muted);max-width:680px;line-height:1.75;">
      Over a decade of hands-on industrial engineering across three of the world's most demanding manufacturing
      ecosystems. That cross-continental experience is now entirely focused on unlocking hidden capacity in
      Gujarat's GIDC clusters.
    </p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════
     3-STEP SYSTEM
══════════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="system" style="background:var(--bg);padding:80px 0;">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="reveal" style="margin-bottom:48px;">
      <div class="tag" style="margin-bottom:12px;">The SNCIO Method</div>
      <h2 class="font-display" style="font-size:clamp(2.2rem,4.5vw,3.5rem);color:var(--text);margin-bottom:10px;">
        THE 3-STEP<br/><span style="color:var(--orange);">OPTIMIZATION SYSTEM</span>
      </h2>
      <p style="font-size:0.95rem;color:var(--text-muted);max-width:520px;line-height:1.75;">
        We don't hand you a 200-page report and disappear. We Diagnose, Design, and Execute — on your floor, with your team.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:22px;" class="step-grid">

      <!-- Step 1 -->
      <div class="card reveal" style="padding:30px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;">
        <div style="position:absolute;top:0;right:0;width:80px;height:80px;border-radius:0 0 0 100%;
          background:rgba(249,115,22,0.06);"></div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin-bottom:22px;">
          <div class="step-num" style="background:rgba(249,115,22,0.1);color:var(--orange);">01</div>
          <div style="height:1px;flex:1;background:rgba(249,115,22,0.2);"></div>
        </div>
        <div style="width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:9px;background:rgba(249,115,22,0.1);
          display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:14px;">
          <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none">
            <circle cx="10" cy="10" r="7" stroke="#f97316" stroke-width="1.5"/>
            <circle cx="10" cy="10" r="2" fill="#f97316"/>
            <line x1="10" y1="1" x2="10" y2="4" stroke="#f97316" stroke-width="1.5"/>
            <line x1="10" y1="16" x2="10" y2="19" stroke="#f97316" stroke-width="1.5"/>
            <line x1="1" y1="10" x2="4" y2="10" stroke="#f97316" stroke-width="1.5"/>
            <line x1="16" y1="10" x2="19" y2="10" stroke="#f97316" stroke-width="1.5"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        <h3 class="font-display" style="font-size:1.8rem;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:2px;">THE AUDIT</h3>
        <p class="font-mono" style="font-size:10px;color:var(--orange);margin-bottom:12px;letter-spacing:0.1em;">DIAGNOSE</p>
        <p style="font-size:0.875rem;color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.75;margin-bottom:16px;">
          We conduct a structured <strong style="color:var(--text);">1-Hour Gemba Walk</strong> — a live, on-floor
          inspection that goes beyond paperwork. We map actual material flow, measure walk distances, identify
          bottlenecks, and quantify the hidden cost of your current layout.
        </p>
        <ul style="list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;">
          <li style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--text-muted);">
            <span style="color:var(--orange);flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;">→</span>
            Flow &amp; bottleneck mapping
          </li>
          <li style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--text-muted);">
            <span style="color:var(--orange);flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;">→</span>
            WIP &amp; inventory pile-up analysis
          </li>
          <li style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--text-muted);">
            <span style="color:var(--orange);flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;">→</span>
            Quantified profit-leakage report
          </li>
        </ul>
      </div>

      <!-- Step 2 -->
      <div class="card reveal" style="padding:30px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
          border-color:rgba(14,165,200,0.28);">
        <div style="position:absolute;top:0;right:0;width:80px;height:80px;border-radius:0 0 0 100%;
          background:rgba(14,165,200,0.06);"></div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin-bottom:22px;">
          <div class="step-num" style="background:rgba(14,165,200,0.1);color:var(--teal-dark);">02</div>
          <div style="height:1px;flex:1;background:rgba(14,165,200,0.2);"></div>
        </div>
        <div style="width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:9px;background:rgba(14,165,200,0.1);
          display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:14px;">
          <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none">
            <rect x="2" y="2" width="7" height="7" stroke="#0ea5c8" stroke-width="1.5"/>
            <rect x="11" y="2" width="7" height="7" stroke="#0ea5c8" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5"/>
            <rect x="2" y="11" width="7" height="7" stroke="#0ea5c8" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5"/>
            <rect x="11" y="11" width="7" height="7" stroke="#0ea5c8" stroke-width="1.5"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        <h3 class="font-display" style="font-size:1.8rem;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:2px;">THE BLUEPRINT</h3>
        <p class="font-mono" style="font-size:10px;color:var(--teal-dark);margin-bottom:12px;letter-spacing:0.1em;">DESIGN</p>
        <p style="font-size:0.875rem;color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.75;margin-bottom:16px;">
          We deliver a <strong style="color:var(--text);">CAD-based optimized floor plan</strong> — not a generic
          template, but a precise layout engineered for your specific product mix, machinery, and growth plan.
          Every square foot justified.
        </p>
        <ul style="list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;">
          <li style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--text-muted);">
            <span style="color:var(--teal-dark);flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;">→</span>
            AutoCAD facility layout drawings
          </li>
          <li style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--text-muted);">
            <span style="color:var(--teal-dark);flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;">→</span>
            Material flow optimization model
          </li>
          <li style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--text-muted);">
            <span style="color:var(--teal-dark);flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;">→</span>
            Machine placement &amp; aisle design
          </li>
        </ul>
      </div>

      <!-- Step 3 -->
      <div class="card reveal" style="padding:30px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;">
        <div style="position:absolute;top:0;right:0;width:80px;height:80px;border-radius:0 0 0 100%;
          background:rgba(249,115,22,0.06);"></div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin-bottom:22px;">
          <div class="step-num" style="background:rgba(249,115,22,0.1);color:var(--orange);">03</div>
          <div style="height:1px;flex:1;background:rgba(249,115,22,0.2);"></div>
        </div>
        <div style="width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:9px;background:rgba(249,115,22,0.1);
          display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:14px;">
          <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none">
            <path d="M4 16 L4 8 L10 4 L16 8 L16 16 Z" stroke="#f97316" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/>
            <line x1="8" y1="16" x2="8" y2="11" stroke="#f97316" stroke-width="1.5"/>
            <line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12" y2="11" stroke="#f97316" stroke-width="1.5"/>
            <line x1="8" y1="11" x2="12" y2="11" stroke="#f97316" stroke-width="1.5"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        <h3 class="font-display" style="font-size:1.8rem;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:2px;">THE BUILD</h3>
        <p class="font-mono" style="font-size:10px;color:var(--orange);margin-bottom:12px;letter-spacing:0.1em;">EXECUTE</p>
        <p style="font-size:0.875rem;color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.75;margin-bottom:16px;">
          We don't leave you with a blueprint and good luck. Our team manages
          <strong style="color:var(--text);">on-ground implementation</strong> — supervising equipment relocation,
          establishing new SOPs, and training your workforce so gains are permanent.
        </p>
        <ul style="list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;">
          <li style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--text-muted);">
            <span style="color:var(--orange);flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;">→</span>
            Supervised floor rearrangement
          </li>
          <li style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--text-muted);">
            <span style="color:var(--orange);flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;">→</span>
            SOP creation &amp; visual management
          </li>
          <li style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--text-muted);">
            <span style="color:var(--orange);flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;">→</span>
            Workforce training &amp; Kaizen culture
          </li>
        </ul>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════
     90% SUBSIDY BLOCK
══════════════════════════════════ -->
<section style="background:var(--bg-section);padding:80px 0;">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="subsidy-card reveal">
      <div class="subsidy-stripe"></div>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:48px;
          align-items:center;padding:40px 44px;position:relative;z-index:2;"
           class="subsidy-inner">

        <!-- Left copy -->
        <div>
          <div class="tag" style="margin-bottom:14px;">Government of India · MSME Ministry</div>
          <h2 class="font-display" style="font-size:clamp(1.9rem,3.8vw,3rem);color:var(--text);margin-bottom:16px;">
            WORLD-CLASS CONSULTING.<br/><span style="color:var(--orange);">AT 1/10TH THE COST.</span>
          </h2>
          <p style="font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:14px;">
            SNCIO is an approved consultant under the
            <strong style="color:var(--text);">MSME Competitive (LEAN) Scheme</strong>.
            The Ministry of MSME, Government of India, subsidizes up to 90% of the consulting fee — directly.
          </p>
          <p style="font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:26px;">
            If you're a registered MSME in Gujarat, you almost certainly qualify.
            We handle all the paperwork.
          </p>
          <a href="#contact" class="btn-primary">Check Your Eligibility →</a>
        </div>

        <!-- Right cost comparison -->
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px;">
          <div class="card-elevated" style="padding:22px;">
            <p class="font-mono" style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-light);margin-bottom:14px;
              letter-spacing:0.08em;">// COST COMPARISON</p>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:16px;margin-bottom:12px;">
              <div>
                <p style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--text-muted);">Standard Market Rate</p>
                <p class="font-display" style="font-size:2.4rem;color:#94a3b8;
                  text-decoration:line-through;text-decoration-color:rgba(239,68,68,0.6);">₹5,00,000</p>
              </div>
              <div style="font-size:1.6rem;color:var(--orange);margin-bottom:4px;">→</div>
              <div>
                <p style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--text-muted);">Your net cost</p>
                <p class="font-display" style="font-size:2.4rem;color:var(--orange);">₹50,000</p>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div style="height:10px;border-radius:99px;background:rgba(14,165,200,0.1);overflow:hidden;">
              <div style="height:100%;width:10%;background:var(--orange);border-radius:99px;"></div>
            </div>
            <p class="font-mono" style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:7px;">
              You pay 10% → GOI covers 90%
            </p>
          </div>
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;">
            <div class="card" style="padding:16px;text-align:center;">
              <p class="font-display" style="font-size:1.8rem;color:var(--orange);">₹0</p>
              <p style="font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:4px;">Subsidy Application Fee</p>
            </div>
            <div class="card" style="padding:16px;text-align:center;">
              <p class="font-display" style="font-size:1.8rem;color:var(--orange);">100%</p>
              <p style="font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:4px;">Documentation Handled by Us</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="card" style="padding:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;
              border-color:rgba(249,115,22,0.3);">
            <div class="pulse-dot" style="width:10px;height:10px;background:var(--orange);flex-shrink:0;"></div>
            <p style="font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--text);">
              <strong>Scheme is active and funded.</strong>
              <span style="color:var(--text-muted);"> Limited slots per cluster per quarter.</span>
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════
     BEFORE / AFTER
══════════════════════════════════ -->
<section style="background:var(--bg);padding:80px 0;">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="reveal" style="margin-bottom:44px;">
      <div class="tag" style="margin-bottom:12px;">Logic Proof</div>
      <h2 class="font-display" style="font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3.2rem);color:var(--text);margin-bottom:10px;">
        THE FLOOR PLAN<br/><span style="color:var(--orange);">TRANSFORMATION</span>
      </h2>
      <p style="font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--text-muted);max-width:480px;line-height:1.75;">
        The same 5,000 sq ft. Two completely different financial outcomes.
        The difference is systematic layout engineering.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:24px;" class="before-after-grid">

      <!-- BEFORE -->
      <div class="reveal">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:14px;">
          <div style="width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;background:#ef4444;"></div>
          <p class="font-display" style="font-size:1.5rem;color:#ef4444;">BEFORE — THE CHAOS TAX</p>
        </div>
        <div class="card" style="padding:16px;border-color:rgba(239,68,68,0.2);">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 400 280" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:100%;height:auto;">
            <defs>
              <pattern id="bg-b" width="20" height="20" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
                <path d="M 20 0 L 0 0 0 20" fill="none" stroke="rgba(14,165,200,0.1)" stroke-width="0.5"/>
              </pattern>
              <marker id="arr-r" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" refX="3" refY="3" orient="auto">
                <path d="M0,0 L0,6 L6,3 z" fill="rgba(239,68,68,0.85)"/>
              </marker>
            </defs>
            <rect width="400" height="280" fill="#f8fafc"/>
            <rect width="400" height="280" fill="url(#bg-b)"/>
            <rect x="10" y="10" width="380" height="260" fill="none" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="2"/>
            <rect x="20" y="20" width="90" height="100" class="broom"/>
            <text x="65" y="68" text-anchor="middle" class="btext">RAW STORE</text>
            <rect x="200" y="20" width="180" height="70" class="broom"/>
            <text x="290" y="58" text-anchor="middle" class="btext">MACHINING</text>
            <rect x="20" y="140" width="160" height="80" class="broom"/>
            <text x="100" y="183" text-anchor="middle" class="btext">ASSEMBLY</text>
            <rect x="240" y="140" width="140" height="80" class="broom"/>
            <text x="310" y="183" text-anchor="middle" class="btext">QUALITY</text>
            <rect x="120" y="20" width="60" height="100" class="broom"/>
            <text x="150" y="68" text-anchor="middle" class="btext">WIP</text>
            <rect x="20" y="240" width="360" height="25" class="broom"/>
            <text x="200" y="255" text-anchor="middle" class="btext">DISPATCH (BACK WALL)</text>
            <path d="M 65 120 Q 290 135 290 140" stroke="rgba(239,68,68,0.75)" stroke-width="1.5"
              stroke-dasharray="5 3" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arr-r)"/>
            <path d="M 290 90 Q 150 120 100 140" stroke="rgba(239,68,68,0.75)" stroke-width="1.5"
              stroke-dasharray="5 3" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arr-r)"/>
            <path d="M 180 180 Q 230 200 240 180" stroke="rgba(239,68,68,0.75)" stroke-width="1.5"
              stroke-dasharray="5 3" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arr-r)"/>
            <path d="M 310 220 Q 200 232 30 240" stroke="rgba(239,68,68,0.75)" stroke-width="1.5"
              stroke-dasharray="5 3" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arr-r)"/>
            <text x="200" y="130" text-anchor="middle" fill="#ef4444"
              font-family="monospace" font-size="9">⚠ avg. material travel: 480m/day</text>
          </svg>
          <div style="margin-top:12px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:7px;">
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;">
              <div style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:#ef4444;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:4px;"></div>
              <p style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--text-muted);">Raw store &amp; dispatch at opposite ends — 120m wasted per pallet</p>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;">
              <div style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:#ef4444;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:4px;"></div>
              <p style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--text-muted);">WIP island creates cross-traffic and collision risk</p>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;">
              <div style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:#ef4444;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:4px;"></div>
              <p style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--text-muted);">Quality checkpoint at dead-end — rework doubles handling cost</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- AFTER -->
      <div class="reveal">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:14px;">
          <div style="width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;background:#22c55e;"></div>
          <p class="font-display" style="font-size:1.5rem;color:#16a34a;">AFTER — THE OPTIMIZED FLOW</p>
        </div>
        <div class="card" style="padding:16px;border-color:rgba(34,197,94,0.25);">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 400 280" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:100%;height:auto;">
            <defs>
              <pattern id="bg-a" width="20" height="20" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
                <path d="M 20 0 L 0 0 0 20" fill="none" stroke="rgba(249,115,22,0.07)" stroke-width="0.5"/>
              </pattern>
              <marker id="arr-g" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" refX="3" refY="3" orient="auto">
                <path d="M0,0 L0,6 L6,3 z" fill="rgba(34,197,94,0.85)"/>
              </marker>
            </defs>
            <rect width="400" height="280" fill="#f8fafc"/>
            <rect width="400" height="280" fill="url(#bg-a)"/>
            <rect x="10" y="10" width="380" height="260" fill="none" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="2"/>
            <rect x="20" y="20" width="80" height="240" class="broom-after"/>
            <text x="60" y="143" text-anchor="middle" class="btext">RAW STORE</text>
            <rect x="120" y="20" width="100" height="110" class="broom-after"/>
            <text x="170" y="78" text-anchor="middle" class="btext">MACHINING</text>
            <rect x="240" y="20" width="140" height="110" class="broom-after"/>
            <text x="310" y="78" text-anchor="middle" class="btext">QUALITY</text>
            <rect x="120" y="150" width="100" height="110" class="broom-after"/>
            <text x="170" y="208" text-anchor="middle" class="btext">ASSEMBLY</text>
            <rect x="240" y="150" width="140" height="110" class="broom-after"/>
            <text x="310" y="208" text-anchor="middle" class="btext">DISPATCH</text>
            <path d="M 100 80 L 120 80" stroke="rgba(34,197,94,0.85)" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arr-g)"/>
            <path d="M 220 80 L 240 80" stroke="rgba(34,197,94,0.85)" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arr-g)"/>
            <path d="M 310 130 L 310 150" stroke="rgba(34,197,94,0.85)" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arr-g)"/>
            <path d="M 240 205 L 220 205" stroke="rgba(34,197,94,0.85)" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arr-g)"/>
            <path d="M 120 205 L 100 205" stroke="rgba(34,197,94,0.85)" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arr-g)"/>
            <text x="200" y="270" text-anchor="middle" fill="#16a34a"
              font-family="monospace" font-size="9">✓ avg. material travel: 95m/day (–80%)</text>
          </svg>
          <div style="margin-top:12px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:7px;">
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;">
              <div style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:#22c55e;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:4px;"></div>
              <p style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--text-muted);">U-shaped flow — raw in, finished out, zero cross-traffic</p>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;">
              <div style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:#22c55e;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:4px;"></div>
              <p style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--text-muted);">Quality integrated inline — defects caught at source, not end</p>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;">
              <div style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:#22c55e;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:4px;"></div>
              <p style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--text-muted);">80% reduction in material travel → direct throughput increase</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════
     LEAD CAPTURE FORM
══════════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="contact" style="background:var(--bg-section);padding:80px 0;">
  <div style="max-width:720px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 24px;">
    <div class="reveal" style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:40px;">
      <div class="tag" style="margin-bottom:12px;">Free Strategy Session</div>
      <h2 class="font-display" style="font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3rem);color:var(--text);margin-bottom:12px;">
        FIND OUT HOW MUCH<br/><span style="color:var(--orange);">YOUR LAYOUT IS COSTING YOU</span>
      </h2>
      <p style="font-size:0.92rem;color:var(--text-muted);max-width:520px;margin:0 auto;line-height:1.75;">
        Fill in the details below. We will contact you within 24 hours to schedule a
        free, no-obligation 30-minute Plant Efficiency Review.
      </p>
    </div>

    <!-- FORM — action points to Formspree; replace YOUR_FORM_ID with your real ID -->
    <div id="form-wrapper" class="card-elevated reveal" style="padding:36px 40px;">
      <form
        action="https://formspree.io/f/xbdqwldn"
        method="POST"
        id="lead-form"
        onsubmit="handleSubmit(event)">

        <!-- Hidden honeypot -->
        <input type="text" name="_gotcha" style="display:none;" tabindex="-1" autocomplete="off" />
        <!-- Reply-to -->
        <input type="hidden" name="_replyto" id="hidden-replyto" value="" />
        <input type="hidden" name="_subject" value="[SNCIO] New Plant Efficiency Enquiry" />

        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px;" class="form-row-2">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label" for="f_name">Full Name *</label>
            <input class="form-input" type="text" id="f_name" name="Name"
              placeholder="Rajesh Patel" required />
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label" for="f_company">Company / Factory Name *</label>
            <input class="form-input" type="text" id="f_company" name="Company"
              placeholder="Patel Engineering Works" required />
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px;" class="form-row-2">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label" for="f_mobile">Mobile Number *</label>
            <input class="form-input" type="tel" id="f_mobile" name="Mobile"
              placeholder="+91 98765 43210" required />
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label" for="f_email">Email Address</label>
            <input class="form-input" type="email" id="f_email" name="Email"
              placeholder="rajesh@company.com"
              oninput="document.getElementById('hidden-replyto').value=this.value" />
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label" for="f_gidc">GIDC Location / Industrial Cluster *</label>
          <select class="form-input" id="f_gidc" name="GIDC_Location" required>
            <option value="" disabled selected>Select your GIDC cluster...</option>
            <option>Vatva, Ahmedabad</option>
            <option>Naroda, Ahmedabad</option>
            <option>Odhav, Ahmedabad</option>
            <option>Changodar, Ahmedabad</option>
            <option>GIDC Rajkot (Aji / Shapar)</option>
            <option>GIDC Surat</option>
            <option>GIDC Vadodara (Makarpura)</option>
            <option>GIDC Anand</option>
            <option>GIDC Vapi</option>
            <option>GIDC Bhavnagar</option>
            <option>Other Gujarat GIDC Cluster</option>
          </select>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label" for="f_industry">Industry / Manufacturing Type *</label>
          <select class="form-input" id="f_industry" name="Industry_Type" required>
            <option value="" disabled selected>Select your industry...</option>
            <option>Engineering &amp; Fabrication</option>
            <option>Auto Components &amp; Parts</option>
            <option>Chemicals &amp; Pharmaceuticals</option>
            <option>Plastics &amp; Rubber</option>
            <option>Textiles &amp; Garments</option>
            <option>Ceramics &amp; Building Materials</option>
            <option>Food Processing &amp; Packaging</option>
            <option>Electronics &amp; Electrical</option>
            <option>Diamond &amp; Jewellery</option>
            <option>Other Manufacturing</option>
          </select>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Current Situation *</label>
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:10px;" class="radio-row">
            <label>
              <input type="radio" name="Situation" value="Optimizing existing plant"
                style="display:none;" required onchange="selectRadio(this)" />
              <div class="radio-card">
                <p style="font-size:1.4rem;margin-bottom:4px;">🏭</p>
                <p style="font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);">Optimizing existing plant</p>
              </div>
            </label>
            <label>
              <input type="radio" name="Situation" value="Expanding / adding capacity"
                style="display:none;" onchange="selectRadio(this)" />
              <div class="radio-card">
                <p style="font-size:1.4rem;margin-bottom:4px;">📈</p>
                <p style="font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);">Expanding / adding capacity</p>
              </div>
            </label>
            <label>
              <input type="radio" name="Situation" value="Setting up new plant"
                style="display:none;" onchange="selectRadio(this)" />
              <div class="radio-card">
                <p style="font-size:1.4rem;margin-bottom:4px;">🏗️</p>
                <p style="font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);">Setting up new plant</p>
              </div>
            </label>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label" for="f_challenge">Biggest Operational Challenge (optional)</label>
          <textarea class="form-input" id="f_challenge" name="Challenge" rows="3"
            style="resize:vertical;"
            placeholder="e.g. 'Our material takes 2 hours to move from store to assembly...'"></textarea>
        </div>

        <button type="submit" id="submit-btn" class="btn-primary"
          style="width:100%;justify-content:center;padding:14px 24px;font-size:0.95rem;">
          → Request My Free 30-Minute Plant Efficiency Call
        </button>

      </form>
    </div>

    <!-- Success state -->
    <div id="success-msg" class="card-elevated" style="display:none;padding:40px;text-align:center;margin-top:16px;">
      <div style="font-size:3rem;margin-bottom:12px;">✅</div>
      <h3 class="font-display" style="font-size:2rem;color:#16a34a;margin-bottom:8px;">REQUEST RECEIVED</h3>
      <p style="color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.75;">
        We will contact you within 24 hours to schedule your free Plant Efficiency Review.
      </p>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════
     FOOTER
══════════════════════════════════ -->
<footer style="padding:56px 0 32px;">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.4fr 1fr 1fr;gap:40px;margin-bottom:40px;"
         class="footer-grid">

      <!-- Brand -->
      <div>
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="SNCIO"
             style="height:54px;width:auto;object-fit:contain;margin-bottom:14px;
             filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.18));" />
        <p style="font-size:0.85rem;color:rgba(240,246,252,0.65);line-height:1.75;max-width:260px;">
          Supply-Network-Centric Industrial Optimization. North American engineering precision
          for India's MSME manufacturers.
        </p>
      </div>

      <!-- Contact -->
      <div>
        <h4 class="font-display" style="font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--orange);margin-bottom:16px;">CONTACT</h4>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;">
          <div>
            <p style="font-weight:600;font-size:0.9rem;color:rgba(240,246,252,0.9);">Neel Shah</p>
            <p class="font-mono" style="font-size:0.7rem;color:rgba(240,246,252,0.45);">
              Principal Consultant · MSME Lean Scheme Qualified
            </p>
          </div>
          <a href="mailto:neels@sncio.in" class="font-mono"
             style="font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--orange);text-decoration:none;">neels@sncio.in</a>
          <a href="tel:+919825722958" class="font-mono"
             style="font-size:0.8rem;color:#5de0f8;text-decoration:none;">+91 98257 22958</a>
          <p class="font-mono" style="font-size:0.72rem;color:rgba(240,246,252,0.4);">
            Gujarat, India · All GIDC clusters
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Services -->
      <div>
        <h4 class="font-display" style="font-size:1.1rem;color:#5de0f8;margin-bottom:16px;">SERVICES</h4>
        <ul style="list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;">
          <li class="font-mono" style="font-size:0.75rem;color:rgba(240,246,252,0.55);">→ Plant Layout Optimization</li>
          <li class="font-mono" style="font-size:0.75rem;color:rgba(240,246,252,0.55);">→ Lean Manufacturing Implementation</li>
          <li class="font-mono" style="font-size:0.75rem;color:rgba(240,246,252,0.55);">→ MSME Lean Scheme Consulting</li>
          <li class="font-mono" style="font-size:0.75rem;color:rgba(240,246,252,0.55);">→ New Plant Greenfield Design</li>
          <li class="font-mono" style="font-size:0.75rem;color:rgba(240,246,252,0.55);">→ Workforce &amp; SOP Training</li>
        </ul>
      </div>

    </div>

    <div style="border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);padding-top:22px;
        display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;">
      <p class="font-mono" style="font-size:0.72rem;color:rgba(240,246,252,0.35);">
        © 2026 SNCIO. All rights reserved. MSME Lean Scheme Approved Consultant.
      </p>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;">
        <span style="font-size:0.72rem;color:rgba(240,246,252,0.35);">Serving</span>
        <span>🇮🇳</span><span>🇺🇸</span><span>🇲🇽</span><span>🇨🇦</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</footer>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════
     RESPONSIVE OVERRIDES
══════════════════════════════════ -->
<style>
  .nav-subtitle { display: block; }
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .nav-subtitle { display: none !important; }
    .hero-grid         { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; gap: 36px !important; }
    .step-grid         { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; }
    .subsidy-inner     { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; gap: 28px !important; padding: 28px 20px !important; }
    .before-after-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; }
    .footer-grid       { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; gap: 28px !important; }
    .metric-bar        { grid-template-columns: repeat(2,1fr) !important; }
    .cred-divider      { display: none !important; }
  }
  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    .metric-bar  { grid-template-columns: repeat(2,1fr) !important; }
    .form-row-2  { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; }
    .radio-row   { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; }
    .subsidy-inner { padding: 22px 16px !important; }
    .subsidy-stripe { display: none; }
    #nav-sub { display: none !important; }
  }
</style>

<script>
  // ── SCROLL REVEAL ──────────────────────────────
  const revealObs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
    entries.forEach(e => {
      if (e.isIntersecting) {
        e.target.classList.add('visible');
        revealObs.unobserve(e.target);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.05 });
  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => revealObs.observe(el));

  // ── RADIO CARDS ────────────────────────────────
  function selectRadio(radio) {
    document.querySelectorAll('input[name="Situation"]').forEach(r => {
      r.nextElementSibling.classList.remove('selected');
    });
    radio.nextElementSibling.classList.add('selected');
  }

  // ── FORM SUBMIT (Formspree native POST + fetch fallback) ──
  async function handleSubmit(e) {
    e.preventDefault();

    // Validate radio
    const sel = document.querySelector('input[name="Situation"]:checked');
    if (!sel) { alert('Please select your current situation.'); return; }

    const btn = document.getElementById('submit-btn');
    btn.textContent = 'Sending…';
    btn.disabled = true;

    // Sync hidden reply-to
    const emailVal = document.getElementById('f_email').value;
    document.getElementById('hidden-replyto').value = emailVal;

    const formData = new FormData(document.getElementById('lead-form'));

    try {
      const res = await fetch('https://formspree.io/f/xbdqwldn', {
        method: 'POST',
        body: formData,
        headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' }
      });

      if (res.ok) {
        document.getElementById('form-wrapper').style.display = 'none';
        const msg = document.getElementById('success-msg');
        msg.style.display = 'block';
        msg.style.padding = '40px';
        msg.style.textAlign = 'center';
        msg.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });
      } else {
        const data = await res.json();
        const errMsg = (data && data.errors)
          ? data.errors.map(e => e.message).join(', ')
          : 'Submission failed.';
        throw new Error(errMsg);
      }
    } catch (err) {
      btn.textContent = '→ Request My Free 30-Minute Plant Efficiency Call';
      btn.disabled = false;
      alert('Could not send. Please email neels@sncio.in or call +91 98257 22958.\nError: ' + err.message);
    }
  }
</script>

</body>
</html>
